channel.title: Microsoft Threat Intelligence on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Microsoft Threat Intelligence on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Crypto Clipper uses Tor and worm-like propagation for persistence and control
item.description:
Microsoft Threat Intelligence described a cryptocurrency clipper campaign that steals and replaces wallet addresses, uses Tor for command-and-control, and spreads in a worm-like way. The malware also maintains persistence and includes a lightweight backdoor for follow-on activity.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: security: The Gentlemen ransomware: Dissecting a self-propagating Go encryptor
item.description:
Microsoft Threat Intelligence analyzed The Gentlemen, a Go-based ransomware used by Storm-2697 affiliates. It uses per-file ephemeral key encryption and a self-propagation module to spread across networks through simultaneous lateral movement techniques.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
